ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (director:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:DIRECTED]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),

    p2 = (director)-[r2:ACTED_IN]->(actor1:Person {name: 'Robert De Niro'}),

    p3 = (movie1)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(review:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})-[r4:REVIEWED]->(reviewer:Person {name: 'Sharon Stein'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What’s the critical role Robert De Niro played in Martin Scorsese’s directorial work on *Taxi Driver*, and how does Sharon Stein’s review of the film reflect its cultural impact during its release year?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Robert De Niro'})-[:ACTED_IN]->(m:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})
MATCH (p)-[ai:ACTED_IN]->(m)<-[:DIRECTED]-(d:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})
MATCH (p)-[r:REVIEWED]->(m)<-[rev:REVIEWED]-(s:Person {name: 'Sharon Stein'})
RETURN ai.roles AS RobertDeNiroRoles, rev.summary AS SharonSteinsReview
